source_meta.source_document: RECLAIM Modular Revision Hip System and PINNACLE Acetabular Cup System

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official RECLAIM revision materials support dedicated modular revision instrumentation paired with compatible Pinnacle acetabular workflow.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official RECLAIM modular revision materials describe distal stem options across multiple lengths and diameters.
Official RECLAIM modular revision materials describe modular proximal body options used to reconstruct revision anatomy.
Official PINNACLE materials describe the acetabular shell family used in DePuy revision hip constructs.
Official PINNACLE materials describe compatible liner and bearing options used with the revision acetabular construct.
Official DePuy revision construct materials describe modular femoral head options used with RECLAIM and PINNACLE.

row.system_notes: Revision total hip construct anchored to official RECLAIM modular/monobloc revision stem pages and the PINNACLE acetabular system page.
